content:
Do we care about closing old issues? I think there are quite a few:

  • https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/797
  • https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/792
  • https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/871
  • https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/874

These are just the first 4 I looked at here.

Yeah, it never hurts closing old issues. Some refer to the old rust, others were simply not closed by the authors nor us, etc. I added some comments on those four and closed them. Thanks! I have also closed some more.
